tool.name: Computer Use
tool.description: Allows the model to interact with a computer via screenshots and UI actions (click, type, scroll).

excluded_actions.description: List of UI actions to disable

ai.systemPromptSection:
### Computer Use
Interact with the computer interface to perform tasks.

**Capabilities:**
- View screen (screenshots)
- Click, Type, Scroll
- Navigate Websites

**Usage:**
Enabled via tool configuration. The model will request screen state and actions.
